feature.name: Refine Design System to Neutral Elegance
feature.description: Upgrade existing design system to a premium neutral elegance style with better consistency and subtle depth
requirements: update color palette to neutral elegance tones
ensure all components use centralized color constants
refine typography hierarchy for better readability
replace harsh shadows with soft subtle shadows
remove unnecessary borders and replace with depth
ensure consistency across all style files
refactoring_tasks: refactor typography.ts for clear heading and body hierarchy
update shadows.ts to use very soft shadows
update globalStyles.ts to apply new background and base styles
remove hardcoded styles from components and replace with design tokens
ui_improvements: ensure good contrast while keeping soft look

content: What changes were made and why
How neutral elegance differs from basic design
How to maintain consistency in UI
How to extend this design system in future
